headline: Tencent hits 17.9% share; Xiaomi, DeepSeek consolidate top 3
summary: Tencent's hy3-20260706:free reached an all-time token share of 17.9%, extending its lead atop the rankings. Xiaomi and DeepSeek hold positions 2 and 3 with 14.7% and 8.5% respectively. Three new entrants appeared today: OpenAI's gpt-5.2-20251211, gpt-5.6-terra-20260709, and Cohere's north-mini-code-20260617:free.
highlights: Xiaomi climbed 2 ranks over 7 days to rank 2
Zhipu AI surged 2 ranks today to position 4
NVIDIA nemotron-3-ultra-550b climbed 8 ranks over 7 days
Dropouts: Qwen qwen3-embedding-8b, Moonshot kimi-k2.5-0127, OpenAI gpt-5-nano-2025-08-07
